name: HTTP Trigger → JSON Transform → Message Publisher
description: Receives an HTTP payload, transforms it to a normalized format, and publishes the result to a NATS message queue for downstream consumers.

replacements.config_delta: Replace SELECTOR+TRANSFORM with MODEL + SYSTEM_PROMPT describing the normalization in natural language (e.g. 'Extract the event type, timestamp, and user_id from this payload and return JSON'). Required secret: llm/api_key added. Use when source schema is variable or requires semantic understanding.
